degree.title: Bachelor of Science (B.S.) in Artificial Intelligence.
degree.summary: A 1.5-year degree completion program focused on machine learning, natural language processing, and strategic AI deployment.
degree.description: The Bachelor's Degree in Artificial Intelligence at UBP is an intensive online program designed for students with a prior tech background, covering machine learning models, neural networks, and AI ethics.

associateDegree.title: Software Development and Quality Control Associate Degree
associateDegree.institution: Universidad del Norte Santo Tomas de Aquino
associateDegree.summary: A 3-year undergraduate degree focusing on end-to-end web development, database management, and advanced QA methodologies.
associateDegree.description: The University Degree in Software Development and Quality at UNSTA equips students to design, implement, and maintain robust software solutions, covering foundational algorithms, web development, and advanced automated testing.
